title: Rastar 48400 BMW I8 Remote Control Car, Black & White, Remote color may vary
features: Detailed Officially Licensed BMW i8 Concept 1/24 Scale Model Vehicle
Fast and full function remote control rc car (Drives forward, reverse, stop, left & right steering)
Custom BMW Wheels With Rubber Grip Tires Authentic Body Styling
Remote Distance 30-40m, Speed: 8-10 kmph, Easy to Operate
Color: White ; Dimensions: Length: 7.5" Width: 3.5" Height: 2.5"
description: Product Description 1:24 BMW i8 Remote Controlled Car, BMW Toy Car Model for Kids Run your toy BMW i8 around your neighborhood! 1/24 scale BMW model car i8 is officially licensed by BMW and scaled according to the original data of real BMW car. Features with highly detailed exterior, remote control BMW car can be driven like a pro! State of the art technology is now yours in the form of a BMW i8 rc car that you can drive forward, backward, left, and right from the included wireless remote control. Reach speeds of about 4 mph and measures about 7.5 inches long. Factory assembled, ready to run, easy to play. The 80 feet range on the remote ensures you can get up to speed in a hurry, and is perfect for racing against friends! Want to show off instead? This officially licensed toy car will turn heads on display as much as on the road with its authentic details and cutting edge BMW styling. Age 6 and over. Full Functions Officially licensed 1/24 remote control BMW i8 toy car All independent suspension system Full function - forward, reverse, stop, left & right Works best indoors / outdoors Highly Detailed Design High detailed interior and exterior Rims and rubber tyres Metallic paint finish Made of ABS safe plastic to prevent scratch and protect kids Vehicle size: 7.5*3.5*2.1 inch Radio Remote Controlled Remote range up to 80 feet, Speed 4 mph Single frequency available in optional 27 MHz or 40 MHz; Frequency cannot be converted BMW toy car requires 3 x AA (not included) Remote controller requires 2 x AA (not included) Directions Drive forward, reverse, left, and right using the remote control. The remote has a range of up to 80 feet and can reach speeds of about 4 mph. Safety Warning Choking Hazard, Small parts, Not suitable for children under 3 yrs See more
